name: Family Meat Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ground beef, oats, milk, salt, pepper, poultry seasoning, eggs, Worcestershire sauce, onions, brown sugar, mustard, nutmeg, and catsup in a large bowl until well mixed.
2. Place the mixture into a round microwave-safe tube pan.
3. In another bowl, mix together any remaining ingredients (if applicable).
4. Pour the additional mixture over the top of the meat mixture in the pan.
5. Microwave at 70% power for about 15 minutes or until the internal temperature reaches 160 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Allow to stand for 5 minutes before cutting and transferring to a serving plate if desired.
